content: JavaFX VBox lays out children in a single vertical column. fillWidth property (defaults true) controls whether children expand to fill VBox width. VBox maximum is Double.MAX_VALUE for both width and height, meaning parent can resize it freely. Setting vgrow constraint via VBox.setVgrow(child, Priority.ALWAYS) makes children grow vertically. VBox does not clip content by default. Preferred sizes can be set via setPrefWidth/setPrefHeight, but USE_COMPUTED_SIZE (default) lets layout compute from content.
